sections.title: A: Circle the correct word
sections.instructions: Choose the correct option in each sentence.

items.sentence: You should eat less sugar if you're on a **diet / cure**.
**Chew / Chop** the onions carefully before cooking them.
What **ingredients / infections** do we need for the soup?
**Stir / Slice** the pasta sauce while it cooks.
This yoghurt tastes too **sour / spicy** to eat.
In **comparison / benefit** with last year, I'm much healthier now.
This cereal doesn't **contain / limit** much sugar.
He's at home with the **flu / cough** today.
Have you ever **suffered / recovered** from back pain?
Don't **affect / ignore** the warning signs of illness.

sections.title: B: Word formation
sections.instructions: Complete the sentences by changing the form of the word in capitals.

items.sentence: Her skin is very ...... (SENSE), so she uses special cream.
Would you like to go ...... (JOG) this evening?
That injection was really ...... (PAIN).
There are many ...... (MEDICINE) websites online.
Regular exercise helps you lose ...... (WEIGH).
It wasn't ...... (INTEND); it happened by accident.
The metal bars were completely ...... (BEND).
My parents bought a new electric ...... (COOK).

sections.title: C: Key Word Transformation
sections.instructions: Complete each second sentence using the word given, so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence. Write between two and five words.

items.sentence:
I've gained weight recently. **on**
I've ...... weight recently.

You should eat less junk food. **down**
You should ...... junk food.

This cheese isn't fresh anymore. **gone**
This cheese ...... .

Seafood causes me allergic reactions. **allergic**
I ...... seafood.

I hope he recovers from the flu quickly. **over**
I hope he ...... the flu quickly.
If you don't drink enough water, you ...... tired.
If I ...... more free time, I would cook healthier meals.
She ...... healthier if she exercised more often.
If we had left earlier, we ...... the doctor on time.
If people eat too much sugar, they ...... weight.
What ...... if you found a cure for this illness?
If he ...... harder, he wouldn't have become ill.
Unless you sleep enough, you ...... exhausted.
She ...... a doctor if the cough continues.
If everyone ...... more exercise, obesity rates would fall.
I ...... sick if I eat too much fast food.
She would have stayed home if she ...... worse.
If I ...... you, I'd stop smoking.
He would feel better if he ...... more vegetables.

sections.title: E: Complete the sentences
sections.instructions: Write one word in each gap.

You should ...... more vegetables in your diet.
He injured his ...... while running.
Doctors say we should ...... plenty of water every day.
Always warm ...... before doing exercise.

He had to ...... with stress at work for months.
You should cut ...... on fizzy drinks.
Vitamin C can help ...... your immune system.
Regular exercise keeps you in good ...... .
Teenagers need plenty of ...... every night.
She ...... a terrible headache after school.
Visit a doctor if the pain ...... for several days.
